headline: Western Digital ESG Progress Puts Sustainability In Focus For Storage Investors
summary: Western Digital (NasdaqGS:WDC) released its FY2025 Annual Sustainability Report, outlining progress in energy efficiency, renewable energy use, and emissions goals. The report includes expanded Scope 3 supply chain emissions targets and new recycled content initiatives for enterprise products. These disclosures arrive as large technology buyers and investors pay closer attention to ESG criteria across data storage and AI infrastructure suppliers. Western Digital sits at the center of data...
